tool.name: EnzyWizard Integrate
tool.description: Integrate multiple EnzyWizard JSON reports into a graph representation

param.name: input_dir
param.label: Input directory
param.help: Directory containing JSON reports to integrate. Must contain exactly one enzywizard_clean report.

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Integrate**
Integrates multiple EnzyWizard JSON reports into a structured graph dataset, where nodes represent residues or substrates, and edges represent molecular interactions.
**Inputs** - Directory containing JSON reports. Must contain exactly one enzywizard_clean report.
**Outputs** - Integrated JSON report.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-integrate` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-integrate
